# discord_color (Data Source)

Converts a color into the decimal RGB integer Discord uses (e.g. for `discord_role.color`). Provide exactly one of `hex` or `rgb`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Convert a hex color into the decimal RGB integer Discord uses.
data "discord_color" "blurple" {
  hex = "#5865F2"
}

# Or provide an RGB triple instead of hex.
data "discord_color" "white" {
  rgb = [255, 255, 255]
}

# Use data.discord_color.blurple.dec for discord_role.color.
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `hex` (String) Hex color string, e.g. `#5865F2` or `5865F2`.
- `rgb` (List of Number) RGB triple as `[r, g, b]`, each 0–255.

### Read-Only

- `dec` (Number) Decimal RGB integer.
